tech_news.title: 'This Should Not Be Possible': Developer Calls for Steam Refund Policy to Change, After Fans Complete Bitesize Game in Under 2 Hours, Leave Great Reviews — Then Get Money Back Anyway - IGN

tech_news.title: Should Palworld Players Wipe Their Data for 1.0 This Week? Pocketpair Offers Official Advice - IGN
tech_news.description: Palworld’s hotly anticipated 1.0 update launches this week, on July 10, and now developer Pocketpair has narrowed the release timing down, while issuing existing players an official recommendation on whether they should wipe their data for it.
